exact_lines_areas_changed: bot_core.py bridge-entry loop: added per-loop _bridge_consumed_slugs guard near current_open_slugs check
bot_core.py bridge-entry loop: mark slug consumed on market_lookup reject, check_entry_gates reject, duplicate-open skip, concurrent-open skip, and successful open
summary: Added a minimal per-loop consumed-slug guard in the bridge entry loop so once a slug is rejected, skipped, or opened in a given loop iteration, a repeated intent for that same slug cannot reach open_position() later in that same iteration.
verification_evidence: Protection was added in bot_core.py only; model_bridge.py was not modified.
The new loop_slug_dedupe rejection path logs minimally and consistently with existing bridge logging.
